signal: Macro: complacent vol plus steep curve cyclical tailwind
note: VIX near 16 and 2s10s near +41 bps create risk-on/financials tailwind context; hedge cost may be favorable. Watch-only.

signal: Iran escalation: US strikes plus prediction-market divergence
note: Fresh strikes and whale prediction-market divergence create fast geopolitical risk context for defense, nuclear fuel, and safe-haven sleeves. Watch-only.

signal: Oil rallying on Iran/Hormuz, inflation and macro watch
note: USO rose roughly 5% week-over-week as Hormuz disruption stayed relevant; matters as inflation/rates input ahead of FOMC. Watch-only.

signal: Oil spike on renewed Iran-US strikes
ticker: USO, ITA, LEU, UUUU, CCJ, BWXT, BE
note: Oil shock can pressure AI-heavy multiples through inflation/rates while supporting defense and nuclear/critical-minerals watch sleeves. Watch-only.

signal: Oil down on US-Iran de-escalation and nuclear-deal expectations
ticker: LEU, UUUU, CCJ, BWXT, BE, ITA
note: Lower oil and yields create a risk-on book tailwind but mixed read for nuclear, energy-transition, and defense sleeves; oil direction is the hard tell. Watch-only.
Higher metals tariffs and ended exemptions are a policy tailwind for domestic materials and critical-minerals exposure. Watch-only.

signal: Growth-to-value rotation is pressuring held semis/AI exposure
ticker: SMH, NVDA, MU, MAGS, GRNY, GRNJ, IGV, IVES, VOLT, QQQ
note: Fundstrat Daily Technical Strategy says the June 5 drawdown looked like rotation from Growth into Value rather than a broad-market top. Semis and QQQ cracked while Healthcare, Energy, Materials, Industrials, and Financials held up better. Watch-only for held AI/semis concentration; no trade call.

signal: QQQ and SOX support bands define next-week damage-control watch
note: Fundstrat flagged QQQ roughly 703-705 and SOX roughly 12,114 as the first important support zones after the June 5 break. If those zones fail, the note shifts toward a deeper second leg lower. Watch-only timing signal for held semis and AI beta.

signal: UW market tide stayed deeply risk-off into the June 5 close
note: Unusual Whales market tide closed with sharply negative net call premium, positive net put premium, and negative net volume, confirming broad tape stress rather than an isolated single-name move. Watch-only flow context.

signal: Strong jobs plus higher yields widened the broad tech drawdown
note: AP market coverage on June 5 said a stronger-than-expected May jobs print pushed Treasury yields higher and helped trigger a tech-led selloff. Broad-market confirmation matches the Fundstrat rotation read. Watch-only.

signal: TNX and crude reversal path still depends on Persian Gulf de-escalation
note: Fundstrat Flash Insights argued yields could peak into next week and crude could keep easing if negotiation progress arrives in the Persian Gulf. This keeps rates/oil headline sensitivity live for financials, energy, and nuclear sleeves. Watch-only until confirmed.
